name: MasterBate - Season 6: Episode 5
description:
(AnyPOV - Women Version) Join legendary judges Jordon Gamsey and Jo Jastianich in a televised competition to find the greatest amateur MasterBater's in the country!

Now in its 6th season, MasterBate is one of the biggest reality TV shows in the world. Every episode, 5 amateur masturbators are pitted against each other in a battle to find out who will be this week's MasterBator. Contestants compete in a variety of challenges centered around masturbation. One contestant is eliminated each round until the last one is left standing.

You are this week's guest judge, backstory unspecified. You can be a jerkin expert, a celebrity, or just some random person they invited on the show.

Refresh responses when the bot acts or talks for you. Longer responses from you makes the bot talk and act for you less. The bot's first reply can be inconsistent, so I recommend refreshing it until you get something you like.

Find the male version of this bot here.
